characters.name: Baron Silas Von Greenback
characters.description: Baron Silas Von GreenbackVoiced byEd GaughanFull nameBaron Silas Von GreenbackOther namesBaronGreenbackBaronì (by Stiletto)SpeciesToadFrogGenderMaleEyesYellowHairBald (formerly blonde)Character InformationGoalTo rule the worldTo destroy Danger MouseBaron Silas Von Greenback's LifeHomeFrog's Head FlyerRelativesDelilah Von Greenback(daughter)Baron Silas Von HumpbackBaron Silas Von SilverbackBaron Silas Von WantyoubackMinionsStiletto MafiosaPandaminionEnemiesDanger MouseErnest PenfoldCharacter AppearancesFirst AppearanceLast AppearanceDanger Mouse Begins... AgainLost in ExaggerationBaron Silas Von Greenbackis the tyrannical toad out to claim the world as his own. He's the main antagonist of the franchise and most commonly known as the most despicable villain on the show. This version of the Baron features in thereboot series. GreenbackBaronì (by Stiletto) Baron is a fat male toad with a rather round build, with thin limbs and a ruby ring. His attire consists of a purple suit, purple tie with a gold button, white dress’s little pains in his butt.

characters.name: Baron Silas Von Penfold
characters.description: Baron Silas Von PenfoldBaron Silas Von PenfoldVoiced byKevin EldonSpeciesHamsterCharacter InformationAlignmentEvilGoalTo take over Earth in the Twystyverse and our universeBaron Silas Von Penfold's LifeMinionsSinister MouseEnemiesDanger Toad,Danger Mouse,PenfoldLikesMangoDislikesMelonCharacter AppearancesFirst AppearanceLast Appearance#SinisterMouseThere's Something About Scarlett Baron Silas Von Penfoldis the evilTwystyverseversion ofPenfoldand boss ofSinister Mouse.  He set out to destroy Earth but fortunately, with the help of Penfold,Danger MouseandDanger Toad, he was defeated.[1] It's unknown what happened to him afterThere's Something About Scarlett. It is assumed he got kicked back into his own universe, he never appeared again.

characters.description: Big Leois a stub about a character.  Why?Limited information. That means that it needs fixing - andYOUcan help out! Big Leois the ruler of a future Earth controlled by cats. Unknown to his followers, Leo is a decendent ofBaron Silas Greenback.

characters.name: Big Mike
characters.description: Big MikeVoiced byEd GaughanSpeciesHippopotamusGenderMaleEyesBlackHairTealCharacter InformationOccupationPie stand ownerAlignmentGoodGoalTo sell piesBig Mike's LifeHomeLondonBig MikeofBig Mike's Pie stallis a friendly hippopotamus who runs a pie stand outsideDanger HQinthe Reboot Series. He is regularly visited by the main cast as his pies are renown. So much so theColonel Kconsiders his stand the greatest achievement the UK has to over the world, even more so thanThe Queen! Mike is a round sized hippo. He wears a yellow shirt, brown pants, black shoes, red apron, black belly bag, Tyrolean hat, along with a pair of black spectacles. Friendly we assume!

characters.name: Birch Badboy
characters.description: Birch BadboyVoiced byKayvan NovakRichard Ayoade(The Return of Danger K)Full nameBirch GoodmanOther namesProfessor Goodman (formerly)Bad Boy (Danger K, Danger Mouse)Penfoldfan (blog name)SpeciesScottish squirrelGenderMaleEyesBlackHairGreen and PurpleCharacter InformationAlignmentGood (formerly)Evil (currently)GoalTo make everyone in the world as rude as himBirch Badboy's LifeAlliesColonel K(formerly)The SnowmanTutan CowmooIvana the invisibleEnemiesColonel K(Currently)Danger MouseErnest PenfoldProfessor SquawkencluckLikesRudenessScarlett Johamster moviesDislikesBeing disrespected as a villainNicenessWeaponsRudeness microphoneBirch Badboy, formerly known as Professor Goodman, is a rude and punky Scottish squirrel out to spread his rude habits throughout the world. Once a kind and beloved scientist of theDanger Agency, a time-traveling accident turned him into the poor mannered fiend he is today.[1]Formally a foe ofColonel K(then going by Danger K) he's now one ofDanger Mouse's the most ill-mannered foes.[2]He appears in theReboot series. Richard Ayoade(The Return of Danger K) The Snowman
